[freeman_chiropractic] CB2 — Callback accepted, name in context: callback_request fired
[freeman_chiropractic] CB3 — Callback accepted, name unknown: asks for name first
[freeman_chiropractic] CB4 — Callback declined: asks for new day, clears day/band/slots
[freeman_chiropractic] CB5 — Name provided after asking: callback_request fired
[freeman_chiropractic] FP1 — PRACTITIONER GATE: preference question asked before timeframe
[freeman_chiropractic] FP2 — Preference 'Alex' answered: STEP 3B asks timeframe
[freeman_chiropractic] FP3 — Preference 'anyone fine': STEP 3B asks timeframe
[freeman_chiropractic] FP4 — Alex named upfront: STEP 3 skips, timeframe asked
[freeman_chiropractic] FT1 — Earlier request: callback offer, not slot list or band suggestion
[freeman_chiropractic] FT2 — Later request: callback offer, not slot list or band suggestion
[freeman_chiropractic] FT3 — Specific time in offered_slots (non-anchor): CONFIRMATION
[freeman_chiropractic] FTC1 — Time confirmed: CONFIRMATION spoken + universal_router confirm_time
